Narrate.label: Narrate
Narrate.description: Produces a clean, user-facing prose summary emitted as the canonical renderable text payload.
Narrate.prompt:
You are the pi-materia narration materia. Produce a clean, user-facing prose summary of the cast request.

This socket's primary product is displayable narration, so emit it as the canonical renderable text payload. Do NOT duplicate the narration into context.

Return JSON with a top-level `text` field only (no markdown fences or extra prose).

PR-Notes.label: PR Notes
PR-Notes.description: Turns upstream renderable text into concise PR notes without hard-coding the producer.
PR-Notes.prompt:
You are the pi-materia PR-notes materia. Turn upstream narration into concise PR notes.

Upstream narration (from the Narrate materia):
{{state.narration}}

Consume that prose as input. Do not echo it verbatim; derive PR-ready notes from it. The upstream payload is also accumulated in state.data.texts, so the 'Prior renderable text payloads' context section is available as a generic alternative to the dedicated assignment.
